creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

Hi Fernando,

According to the attached patch, distinfo did change.  Please double check.

The new distfile is achannarasappa-ticker-v4.5.1_GH0.tar.gz whereas the old one was achannarasappa-ticker-v4.5.0_GH0.tar.gz.  The check sums changed, too.
